questions.question: What is the primary goal of an algorithm?
questions.hint: A step-by-step procedure for solving a problem

questions.question: What is a key characteristic of an algorithm?
options: It can be solved by a computer in a finite amount of time
It must be a physical process
It can only be used once
It can be solved by a computer in a finite amount of time

questions.question: What is the difference between a algorithm and a recipe?
questions.hint: A recipe is a set of instructions for cooking a meal, while an algorithm is a set of instructions for solving a problem
